name: assets-copy
title: Assets / Copy
description: Copy the asset at path and stores it at newPath. Does AssetDatabase.Refresh() at the end. Use 'assets-find' tool to find assets before copying.

parameters.name: sourcePaths
parameters.description: Array of asset paths to copy. Example: ["Assets/Materials/Mat.mat"]

parameters.name: destinationPaths
parameters.description: Array of destination paths (same length as sourcePaths). Example: ["Assets/Materials/MatCopy.mat"]
